interpretation_mapping: The claim concerns local schema-shape validation, not empirical truth.
limitations: fixture alone does not prove the architecture claim
consumer_requirements: run protocol fixture validation before citing as implemented shape check
downgrade_rule: If validation fails, block promotion and keep support at argument or lower.
residual_route: route semantic or verifier mismatch to tribunal review
ledger_update: No support-state promotion is implied by this fixture.
non_claims: fixture does not prove semantic equivalence
fixture does not discharge a theorem
